overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing the character Michael walking and running through the streets of Los Santos. The character moves along sidewalks, crosses a street, and interacts with an urban environment featuring palm trees, billboards, and passing vehicles including a military truck.

events.description: character stops walking away and turns around to face the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk away from camera, then turning around to walk back toward the camera

metal chain-link fence running along the left side of the sidewalk
row of palm trees lining the street

multi-story white building with classical architecture

trash and debris scattered across the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk past a green dumpster and chain-link fence. The environment features palm trees, traffic lights, and distant buildings including a white historic structure and a modern glass tower. The character turns around and begins walking back toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and passing vehicles

events.description: character transitions from walking to running toward the camera
character crosses from concrete sidewalk onto street asphalt

agents.ego_description: running toward the camera, then turning right to cross the street and run along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: commercial building with yellow signage and dark windows
single-story building with red awning and signage
paved road surface with crosswalk markings
black four-door sedan driving on the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs toward the camera and crosses the street, transitioning from concrete sidewalk to asphalt. A black sedan drives by on the right. The character passes behind a palm tree trunk and emerges on the opposite sidewalk near a yellow storefront and red restaurant building.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with restaurant and pedestrian traffic

events.description: character slows from running to walking pace

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk past other pedestrians, then slowing to a walking pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt standing on the sidewalk near the curb
group of pedestrians walking ahead along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the commercial sidewalk past pedestrians, with a red restaurant featuring visible signage on the right. The pace slows as the character approaches a group of pedestrians. The street is now clear of vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with military and civilian traffic passing

events.description: military cargo truck drives past on the street from left to right
black sedan drives past following the military truck

agents.ego_description: standing on the sidewalk watching military and civilian vehicles pass by on the street

notable_agents.action: military cargo truck with camouflage pattern driving down the street
black sedan following behind the military truck

entered.detail: large military-style cargo truck with green camouflage paint
black sedan following the military vehicle

segments.scene_description: The character stops on the sidewalk to observe traffic. A military cargo truck passes by on the street, followed by a black sedan. Other pedestrians stand nearby watching the vehicles. The red restaurant remains visible on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling city street that shifts from a quiet sidewalk walk to a focused observation of urban traffic. It begins with the character walking past a green dumpster and chain-link fence beneath palm trees, before he turns and runs directly toward the camera. As he crosses the asphalt street, a black sedan drives by, and the camera follows him as he emerges on the opposite sidewalk near a yellow storefront and a red restaurant. The scene then shifts as the character slows his pace to navigate past pedestrians along the commercial strip. Finally, the movement comes to a halt on the sidewalk, where the character stops to watch a military cargo truck and another black sedan pass by against the backdrop of the red restaurant.
